stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — owns billing head-state aggregate (Postgres CNPG, one row per customer)
volatility: Billing-state persistence — how/where the billing aggregate (registration, stored-instrument binding, ServicePricing policy ref, per-period service-invoice outcome, delinquency posture) is stored. Backing store (Postgres head-state today) is the variable.

outbound.name: billingState
outbound.how: direct, by value — read row / guarded in-place update (version + applied_mutation dedup) via Postgres CNPG pool

ops.signature: registerCustomer(customerId: CustomerID, expectedVersion: Version, profile: CustomerBillingProfile, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Opens the billing aggregate for a new customer; bumps version 0→1; dedup-first on idempotencyKey.

fields.name: (value)
fields.note: new per-aggregate state-commit token after successful mutation

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | ContractMisuse

ops.signature: bindStoredInstrument(customerId: CustomerID, expectedVersion: Version, binding: StoredInstrumentBinding, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Records that the user's stored charge instrument is bound and gateway-validated; stores infrastructure-opaque gateway reference.

fields.name: Binding
fields.note: struct{GatewayRef string; BoundAt string} — gateway-opaque; never a PAN

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | ContractMisuse

ops.signature: recordServiceInvoice(customerId: CustomerID, expectedVersion: Version, periodId: PeriodID, outcome: ServiceInvoiceOutcome, idempotencyKey) → Version
ops.note: Records per-period service-invoice outcome (amount, charge result, escalation/persistent-decline flags); corrects entry in place.

fields.name: Outcome
fields.note: struct{Amount int64; TokenCharge int64; HostingCharge int64; Result InvoiceResult; Escalated bool; PersistentlyDeclined bool; RecordedAt string}

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: kinds: Conflict | NotFound | Transient | Infrastructure | ContractMisuse

ops.note: Returns the whole head-state aggregate; serves CQRS read split (SPA) and pre-charge pricing-policy read.

fields.name: Instrument
fields.note: nil until bindStoredInstrument; struct{GatewayRef string; BoundAt string}

ops.note: Returns all customers whose latest service invoice is persistently declined; drives the BillingRetrySweepWorkflow.

fields.name: (value)
fields.note: each: struct{CustomerID uuid.UUID; LatestPeriodID string; DeclinedAmount int64; LastAttemptAt string}; possibly empty

dataContracts: CustomerID = uuid.UUID // canonical billing aggregate identity
Version uint64 // optimistic-concurrency token; 0 == no row yet
Billing struct { CustomerID, Version, Profile CustomerBillingProfile, Instrument *StoredInstrumentBinding, Periods map[PeriodID]ServiceInvoiceOutcome, Delinquency DelinquencyPosture }
CustomerBillingProfile struct { ServicePricingRef string /+ customer identity fields/ }
StoredInstrumentBinding struct { GatewayRef string, BoundAt string } // gateway-opaque; never a PAN
ServiceInvoiceOutcome struct { Amount int64, TokenCharge int64, HostingCharge int64, Result InvoiceResult, Escalated bool, PersistentlyDeclined bool, RecordedAt string }
DelinquencyPosture struct { PersistentlyDeclined bool, LatestPeriodID PeriodID }
DelinquentCustomerSummary struct { CustomerID, LatestPeriodID, DeclinedAmount int64, LastAttemptAt string }
errorModel: framework-go/resourceaccess.Error — Conflict / NotFound / Transient / Infrastructure / ContractMisuse. No RateLimited or Auth (process-local CNPG pool, no remote credential). Declined charge is NOT an error here; recorded as ServiceInvoiceOutcome.Result == InvoiceDeclined.
idempotency: Dedup-first on caller-supplied idempotencyKey (Manager-derived ${workflowId}:${activityId}) recorded in applied_mutation ledger in the same transaction as the mutation. Optimistic concurrency via expectedVersion column; stale version → Conflict (workflow-level re-read loop, not Activity retry).

revisions.summary: Initial design: re-cut from sunk settlementStateAccess after 2026-06-09 MoR reversal; charge-only billing head-state on Postgres; 5 ops mirroring projectStateAccess/operatedSystemStateAccess discipline; substrate ruling (Postgres not git) ratified.

APPROVE-AND-FREEZE: 9/9 App C §6 PASS, 0 WAIVED. OQ-2 RULED keep folded (markPersistentlyDeclined has no caller). OQ-1/3/4/5 accepted. Editorial amendments A-1 (dynamic-view coverage note + FU-BS-1 routing) and A-2 (P3 mechanism pin for D-BM R-1 composition) applied under mayAmend. FU-BM-2 HARD GATE CLEARED.
